name: Redis Enterprise - Database Dashboard
description: First-pass New Relic implementation of the validated Redis Enterprise database operations dashboard.

rawConfiguration.text:
# Redis Enterprise Database Dashboard

First-pass New Relic implementation of the validated Redis Enterprise database dashboard. Filter by `cluster` and `db` using the template variables above.

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT latest(db_config) AS 'up' WHERE metricName = 'db_config' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET db_name LIMIT 1
FROM Metric SELECT latest(db_config) AS 'up' WHERE metricName = 'db_config' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET db_version LIMIT 1

FROM Metric SELECT latest(endpoint_client_connections) - latest(endpoint_client_disconnections) - latest(endpoint_proxy_disconnections) AS 'active connections' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}})

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_db_keys) AS keys WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(keys) AS 'keys' SINCE 2 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_up) AS 'up' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, slots, node, status LIMIT MAX SINCE 2 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT latest(db_status) AS 'status' WHERE metricName = 'db_status' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}})
FROM Metric SELECT uniqueCount(proxy) AS 'endpoints' WHERE metricName = 'endpoint_read_requests' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}})
FROM Metric SELECT uniqueCount(redis) AS 'shards' WHERE metricName = 'redis_server_used_memory' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}})

FROM Metric SELECT (average(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum) / average(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count)) / 1000 AS 'read ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (average(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum) / average(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count)) / 1000 AS 'write ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (average(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum) / average(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count)) / 1000 AS 'other ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (average(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum) / average(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count)) / 1000 AS 'read latency' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET proxy TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (average(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum) / average(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count)) / 1000 AS 'write latency' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET proxy TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (average(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum) / average(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count)) / 1000 AS 'other latency' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET proxy TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT sum(redis_server_used_memory) AS 'used memory' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT sum(redis_server_current_cow_size) AS 'current cow size' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT sum(namedprocess_namegroup_memory_bytes) AS 'resident memory' WHERE memtype = 'resident' AND groupname LIKE 'redis-%' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(db_memory_limit_bytes) AS 'db memory limit' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT ((max(endpoint_read_requests) - min(endpoint_read_requests)) + (max(endpoint_write_requests) - min(endpoint_write_requests)) + (max(endpoint_other_requests) - min(endpoint_other_requests))) / 60 AS 'total req/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT (max(endpoint_read_requests) - min(endpoint_read_requests)) / 60 AS 'read req/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT (max(endpoint_write_requests) - min(endpoint_write_requests)) / 60 AS 'write req/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT (max(endpoint_other_requests) - min(endpoint_other_requests)) / 60 AS 'other req/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT average(redis_server_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) AS 'ops/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT (max(endpoint_ingress) - min(endpoint_ingress)) / 60 AS 'endpoint ingress' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT (max(endpoint_egress) - min(endpoint_egress)) / 60 AS 'endpoint egress' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_total_net_input_bytes) - min(redis_server_total_net_input_bytes)) / 60 AS 'shard input' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_total_net_output_bytes) - min(redis_server_total_net_output_bytes)) / 60 AS 'shard output' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT latest(endpoint_client_connections) - latest(endpoint_client_disconnections) - latest(endpoint_proxy_disconnections) AS 'active connections' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(endpoint_client_connections), 1 second) AS 'new connections / sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(endpoint_client_disconnections), 1 second) AS 'client disconnections / sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(endpoint_proxy_disconnections), 1 second) AS 'proxy disconnections / sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(namedprocess_namegroup_cpu_seconds_total), 1 minute) * 100 AS 'cpu %' WHERE mode IN ('user', 'system') AND groupname LIKE 'redis-%' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, role, node, mode TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_used_memory) AS 'used memory' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_current_cow_size) AS 'current cow size' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_strings_sizes_under_128M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'strings <128M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_hashes_items_under_1M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'hashes <1M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_hashes_items_1M_to_8M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'hashes 1M-8M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_hashes_items_over_8M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'hashes >8M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_lists_items_under_1M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'lists <1M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_lists_items_1M_to_8M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'lists 1M-8M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_lists_items_over_8M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'lists >8M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_sets_items_under_1M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'sets <1M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_sets_items_1M_to_8M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'sets 1M-8M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_sets_items_over_8M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'sets >8M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_zsets_items_under_1M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'zsets <1M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_zsets_items_1M_to_8M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'zsets 1M-8M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_zsets_items_over_8M) AS value WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(value) AS 'zsets >8M' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_db_keys) AS keys, latest(redis_server_db_expires) AS expires WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis, node LIMIT MAX) SELECT sum(keys) AS 'keys', sum(expires) AS 'expiring keys' SINCE 2 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(redis_server_expired_keys), 1 minute) AS 'expired/sec' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(redis_server_evicted_keys), 1 minute) AS 'evicted/sec' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(redis_server_keys_trimmed), 1 minute) AS 'trimmed/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

widgets.title: p99.9 Latency (ms) Over Time [read, write, other requests]

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 99.9) / 1000 AS 'read p99.9 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 99.9) / 1000 AS 'write p99.9 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 99.9) / 1000 AS 'other p99.9 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

widgets.title: p99 Latency (ms) Over Time [read, write, other requests]

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 99) / 1000 AS 'read p99 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 99) / 1000 AS 'write p99 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 99) / 1000 AS 'other p99 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

widgets.title: p50 Latency (ms) Over Time [read, write, other requests]

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 50) / 1000 AS 'read p50 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 50) / 1000 AS 'write p50 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT bucketPercentile(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_bucket, 50) / 1000 AS 'other p50 ms' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_connected_clients) AS 'connected clients', latest(redis_server_maxclients) AS 'max clients', latest(redis_server_pubsub_clients) AS 'pubsub clients', latest(redis_server_blocked_clients) AS 'blocked clients' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits), 1 minute) / (rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits), 1 minute) + rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_read_misses), 1 minute))) * 100 AS 'read hit ratio', (rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits), 1 minute) / (rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits), 1 minute) + rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_write_misses), 1 minute))) * 100 AS 'write hit ratio' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits), 1 minute) AS 'read hits/sec', rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_read_misses), 1 minute) AS 'read misses/sec', rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits), 1 minute) AS 'write hits/sec', rate(sum(redis_server_keyspace_write_misses), 1 minute) AS 'write misses/sec', rate(sum(redis_server_lazyfreed_objects), 1 minute) AS 'lazyfree/sec', rate(sum(redis_server_total_error_replies), 1 minute) AS 'errors/sec' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT sum(redis_server_blocked_clients) AS 'blocked clients' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT average(redis_server_mem_fragmentation_ratio) AS 'fragmentation ratio' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_master_repl_offset) - latest(redis_server_slave_offset) AS 'offset diff bytes' WHERE role = 'master' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT sum(redis_server_aof_delayed_fsync) AS 'delayed fsync', sum(redis_server_mem_aof_buffer) AS 'aof buffer bytes' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

nrqlQuery.query: FROM Metric SELECT uniques(cluster) WHERE metricName = 'db_config' SINCE 30 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT uniques(db) WHERE metricName = 'db_config' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) SINCE 30 minutes ago
